chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1269 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5358/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 28.09.2023 Mr. Shahid Aziz Kaleri, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional Prosecutor General for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not press this petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
